entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A climate-resilient crop grown in marginal agro-ecologies and semi-arid tropics of Asia and Africa, known for nutritional qualities and low input requirements

entities.name: MARGINAL AGRO-ECOLOGIES
entities.description: Environmental conditions characterized by poor soil or harsh climates where pearl millet is cultivated

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Tropical regions with limited rainfall where pearl millet is a key crop

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A geographic location where pearl millet is cultivated

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A geographic location where pearl millet is cultivated

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL QUALITIES
entities.description: The beneficial nutritional attributes of pearl millet

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: A desired trait for pearl millet hybrids to ensure economic returns

entities.name: HYBRIDS
entities.description: Superior genotypes developed through breeding to achieve high yield

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic characteristics among genotypes, essential for developing superior hybrids

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used as fluorescent labeled tools for genetic diversity analysis

entities.name: POLYMORPHIC ALLELES
entities.description: Different versions of a gene or marker produced from SSR markers used to identify diversity

entities.name: POLYMORPHIC INFORMATION CONTENT
entities.description: A metric used to measure the informativeness of a genetic marker

entities.name: HETEROZYGOSITY
entities.description: The state of having two different alleles at a locus, detected at low levels in the studied genotypes

entities.name: GENETIC DISSIMILARITY
entities.description: The degree of genetic difference between pairs of inbred lines

entities.name: HETEROSIS BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding method that exploits genetic variability to develop high-yielding hybrids

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: The method of evaluating genetic variation within a crop population using markers
